ogTitle: Yowie Bay vs Yowrie: Climate Safety

heading: Yowie Bay vs Yowrie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yowie Bay, New South Wales and Yowrie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yowrie has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Yowie Bay (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yowie Bay or Yowrie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yowie Bay has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Yowrie scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yowie Bay scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Yowrie scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yowie Bay or Yowrie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yowrie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
